calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-06-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-13-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for (petitioner) Aishlin O'Coyle.

Ms. Alavi confirmed that there has been no opposition and that they have addressed the issues raised by the examiner in their supplement which was filed yesterday. The Court granted the petition for letters of administration with will annexed, admitting the destroyed will dated October 7, 2010 to probate (subject to review of the order). A status on closing the estate is set for December 6, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
